subquery_results.sub_question: What is the average Time for athletes in T22 and T23 over each Year?

attempts.sql:
WITH CombinedTimes AS (
  SELECT Year, CAST(REPLACE(Time, ':', '.') AS REAL) AS Time
  FROM T22
  UNION ALL
  SELECT Year, CAST(REPLACE(Time, ':', '.') AS REAL) AS Time
  FROM T23
)
SELECT Year, AVG(Time) AS Average_Time
FROM CombinedTimes
GROUP BY Year;
attempts.error: Schema validation: unknown table 'CombinedTimes' (not in cluster schema).

attempts.sql:
SELECT Year, AVG(CAST(REPLACE(Time, ':', '') AS REAL)) AS Average_Time
FROM (
  SELECT Year, Time FROM T22
  UNION ALL
  SELECT Year, Time FROM T23
)
GROUP BY Year;

subquery_results.final_sql:
SELECT Year, AVG(CAST(REPLACE(Time, ':', '') AS REAL)) AS Average_Time
FROM (
  SELECT Year, Time FROM T22
  UNION ALL
  SELECT Year, Time FROM T23
)
GROUP BY Year;
